name: Survey: Fall Grant Writing Workshop Series Development
summary: The UNLV Division of Research and UNLV Writing Center are partnering to develop a series of workshops this fall 2026 semester aimed at supporting UNLV faculty with grant writing. Faculty who are interested in participating can complete a brief survey .

name: Boost Your Google Workspace Skills: Register Now for Upcoming Webinars
summary: UNLV Information Technology's live Google Workspace webinars will show you practical features that help you build skills you can use right away. All webinars begin at 10 a.m. and are approximately 45 minutes, except as noted, with time for questions.

name: Reminder: Sophos Expires May 15, Check Your Security Software
summary: Our Sophos license will end on May 15. If you still have Sophos installed, you will see an alert that your computer is no longer protected. Please contact the IT Help Desk immediately for assistance with installing SentinelOne to protect your computer.

name: Action Required: Sophos Expires May 15, Check Your Security Software
summary: Our Sophos license will end on May 15 and will stop receiving updates that protect your computer. Instead, your campus computer should now be running SentinelOne , a modern, AI-driven security platform designed to better protect against today's sophisticated cyber threats.
